title: bagx Finding
description: Structured readiness finding emitted by bagx eval (schema_version 1.1.0+). One Finding is a stable, machine-readable readiness result for a recorded ROS2 bag.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier in the form '<domain>.<area>.<qualifier>'. Used by benchmark expected_findings and bagx diff.

severity.description: info: healthy or informational. warning: degraded but usable. error: unreliable, should not be used as-is. critical: reserved for catastrophic readiness loss (not emitted by built-in checks today).

category.description: Coarse grouping. Built-in values: domain_detection, sensor_quality, topic_presence, rate_quality, sync_quality, workflow_observability, workflow_outcome, custom_rules. Plugins may introduce additional categories.

domain.description: Domain identifier (slam, nav2, autoware, moveit, perception, robotarm, or a custom domain id). Null when the finding is not domain-specific.

affected_topics.description: Topics this finding refers to. May be empty when the finding is global.

suggested_action.description: Recommended next step for the user. Null when no action is needed.

confidence.description: Confidence in the finding. Defaults to medium.

evidence.title: bagx Evidence
evidence.description: One measured or observed fact supporting a Finding.

metric.description: Short metric identifier (e.g. fix_rate, accel_noise_mean, mean_delay_ms).

observed.description: Observed value. May be a number, boolean, string, array, or object depending on the metric.

expected.description: Expected value or threshold expression (e.g. '>=0.95', '<20'). May be null when no fixed expectation applies.

unit.description: SI-style unit for the observed value (e.g. Hz, ms, m/s^2, rad/s). Null when the metric is unitless.

topic.description: ROS2 topic this evidence refers to. Null when the metric is global.
